title: Math
description: Lets you do math in Minecraft
body:
# Math
Lets you do math in Minecraft\
Additional information: https://mathparser.org/
## Commands
- /math {Expressions}
## Examples
- /math 3 + 5\
Output: 8
- /math x=3; y=5; x+y\
Output: 8
## Permissions
- Math.math: /math

For questions please contact me on Discord: Tamion#7835
